explanation: The user specifies not to use cup_0 and requests to pick up another cup. I first place the currently held cup_0 on the countertop to put it away. Then, I pick up a different cup, cup_1 (since it's a new cup not in use), and execute the remaining steps from the old plan using cup_1 instead. This includes placing it on the coffeemachine, turning it on and off, and finally placing it back on the countertop. The plan ensures the correct object is used and all not-attempted steps are completed with the new cup.
